title: USCIS FIELD OFFICES - 211info
text: UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE USCIS FIELD OFFICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Field office of the federal agency that oversees immigration to the United States. Processes applications for naturalization, citizenship, and permanent resident status. 1455 NW Overton Street Suite 1 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment (800) 375-5283 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 375-5283 National Customer Service INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Applications can be submitted in person at an INFOPASS Kiosk or the Information Counter. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Bring all of the following items to your appointment: -Photo ID -Printout of your INFOPASS appointment -Any notices sent to you by United States Citizenship and Immigration Services -Copy of the application or petition you filed -Proof of payment, such as a copy of a cancelled check (front and back) or money order that has been traced for payment or a handwritten receipt from an Immigration Services Officer AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Public parking is available both on the street and in a parking lot across the street. TriMet bus lines 17, 77 or Portland Streetcar. Services: Immigration/Naturalization Adjudication Offices Immigration/Naturalization Adjudication Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE
